name: codex-preflight-skill
description: Preflight execution engine that forces structured planning before coding

interface.shortDescription: Forces structured planning before any code output
interface.longDescription: Codex Preflight Execution Engine v3.0. Before writing any code, enforces: FULL MODE (12-step for new projects) or LIGHT MODE (6-step for small changes). Hard constraints on A/B/C/D/E questioning, mandatory decision lock tables, state machine tracking, and SPEC generation. Blocks all code output until USER_CONFIRMATION received.
defaultPrompt: 我想做一个项目，帮我先梳理需求
Review this project and suggest improvements
Turn my idea into a development spec
